calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Ciliberto for Grace Fong (Petitioner).

Mr. Jordan stated that this is a simple wrinkle in the law, that his Client's Mother created the power of attorney back in 2010, that the expectation was for the document to be used in the future to create a trust for her Mother, that the concern is the Client's signature on the deed and of a third party with respect to financing in the future, and that his Client wants a clean order of title. The Petition to Determine Existence of Trust is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
